item.text: I found the enum block and now I’m running a strict extraction command to confirm the exact variant identifiers and their alphabetical order.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "awk '/pub enum LoopAuditEvent \\{/{in_enum=1;next} in_enum && /"'^}/ {in_enum=0} in_enum && /''^[[:space:]]+[A-Za-z0-9_]+[[:space:]]*'"\\{/ {gsub(/"'^[[:space:]]+/,"",$0); sub(/[[:space:]]*'"\\{.*/,\"\","'$0); print $0}'"' crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs | sort"
